name: cc-antigravity-plugin
description: Agentic coding assistant powered by Antigravity CLI (AGY) — creates, edits, and searches files autonomously with model selection, QUOTA_EXAUSTED signaling, and conversation continuity

default_model.title: Default AGY Model
default_model.description: Model identifier to use when --model is not specified. Available models: gemini-3.5-flash-low, gemini-3.5-flash-medium (default), gemini-3.5-flash-high, gemini-3.1-pro-low, gemini-3.1-pro-high, claude-4.6-sonnet-thinking, claude-4.6-opus-thinking, gpt-oss-120b-medium.

timeout.title: Default Timeout
timeout.description: Default timeout for AGY print mode, for example 3m, 300s, or 5m0s.
